'''鈭歜-y-y''' ('''kabayay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:limpet|limpet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:limpet|limpet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-y-y
|-
! Lemma
| kabayay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibayay|thibayay]] || [[word:jibayay|jibayay]] || [[word:shibayay|shibayay]] || [[word:kibayay|kibayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubayay|thuthubayay]] || [[word:jujubayay|jujubayay]] || [[word:shushubayay|shushubayay]] || [[word:kukubayay|kukubayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubayay|thubayay]] || [[word:jubayay|jubayay]] || [[word:shubayay|shubayay]] || [[word:kubayay|kubayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubayay|thubayay]] || [[word:jubayay|jubayay]] || [[word:shubayay|shubayay]] || [[word:kubayay|kubayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebayay|thebayay]] || [[word:jebayay|jebayay]] || [[word:shebayay|shebayay]] || [[word:kebayay|kebayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobayay|thothobayay]] || [[word:jojobayay|jojobayay]] || [[word:shoshobayay|shoshobayay]] || [[word:kokobayay|kokobayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobayay|thobayay]] || [[word:jobayay|jobayay]] || [[word:shobayay|shobayay]] || [[word:kobayay|kobayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobayay|thobayay]] || [[word:jobayay|jobayay]] || [[word:shobayay|shobayay]] || [[word:kobayay|kobayay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]] || [[word:bayay|bayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bayay|th忙bayay]] || [[word:j忙bayay|j忙bayay]] || [[word:sh忙bayay|sh忙bayay]] || [[word:k忙bayay|k忙bayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabayay|thathabayay]] || [[word:jajabayay|jajabayay]] || [[word:shashabayay|shashabayay]] || [[word:kakabayay|kakabayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabayay|thabayay]] || [[word:jabayay|jabayay]] || [[word:shabayay|shabayay]] || [[word:kabayay|kabayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabayay|thabayay]] || [[word:jabayay|jabayay]] || [[word:shabayay|shabayay]] || [[word:kabayay|kabayay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabayay|shabayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabayay|goshabayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabayay|gokishabayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabayayn眉|shabayayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabayaynkn眉|goshabayaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabayayn眉|gokishabayayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabayaysh毛|shabayaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabayaynksh毛|goshabayaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabayaysh毛|gokishabayaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabayayro|shabayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabayaynkro|goshabayaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabayayro|gokishabayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabayaymu|shabayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabayaynkmu|goshabayaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabayaymu|gokishabayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabayaysher|shabayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabayaynksher|goshabayaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabayaysher|gokishabayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabayayng|shabayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabayaynkng|goshabayaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabayayng|gokishabayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabayayya|shabayayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabayaynkya|goshabayaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabayayya|gokishabayayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabayayyam|shabayayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabayaynkyam|goshabayaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabayayyam|gokishabayayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabayayn眉sh毛|shabayayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabayaynkn眉sh毛|goshabayaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabayayn眉sh毛|gokishabayayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabayayn眉ro|shabayayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabayaynkn眉ro|goshabayaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabayayn眉ro|gokishabayayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabayayn眉mu|shabayayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabayaynkn眉mu|goshabayaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabayayn眉mu|gokishabayayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabayaysh毛n眉|shabayaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabayaynksh毛n眉|goshabayaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabayaysh毛n眉|gokishabayaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabayaysh毛ro|shabayaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabayaynksh毛ro|goshabayaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabayaysh毛ro|gokishabayaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabayaysh毛mu|shabayaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabayaynksh毛mu|goshabayaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabayaysh毛mu|gokishabayaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabayayron眉|shabayayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabayaynkron眉|goshabayaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabayayron眉|gokishabayayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabayayrosh毛|shabayayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabayaynkrosh毛|goshabayaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabayayrosh毛|gokishabayayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabayayromu|shabayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabayaynkromu|goshabayaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabayayromu|gokishabayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabayaymun眉|shabayaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabayaynkmun眉|goshabayaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabayaymun眉|gokishabayaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabayaymush毛|shabayaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabayaynkmush毛|goshabayaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabayaymush毛|gokishabayaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabayaymuro|shabayaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabayaynkmuro|goshabayaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabayaymuro|gokishabayaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
